title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at L&T Realty

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at L&T Realty
jsonLd.description:
L&T Realty has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Realty:
L&T Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty!
